requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Slovenia should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, public-sector project, or ELES/distribution-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under project or national requirements. Radio modules must comply with RED 2014/53/EU where applicable.
summary.zh: 在斯洛文尼亚，若充电点运营商、公共部门项目或ELES/配电相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据项目或国家要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。无线模块在适用情况下须符合RED 2014/53/EU。
summary.zht: 在斯洛維尼亞，若充電點運營商、公共部門項目或ELES/配電相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據項目或國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。無線模組在適用情況下須符合RED 2014/53/EU。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — for radio modules where in scope
AKOS (Agencija za komunikacijska omrezja in storitve) or applicable spectrum authority requirements for radio modules in Slovenia where in scope

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Slovenia operators, roaming, language, currency, and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为斯洛文尼亚运营商、漫游、语言、货币和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為斯洛維尼亞運營商、漫遊、語言、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (including RED compliance for radio modules), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Slovenia configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific distribution operator supply point and network constraints in Slovenia.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终斯洛文尼亚配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（包括无线模块的RED合规），以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体配电运营商供电点及斯洛文尼亚电网约束进行审查。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終斯洛維尼亞配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（包括無線模組的RED合規），以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體配電運營商供電點及斯洛維尼亞電網約束進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Slovenia; EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where required by SIST, ELES, Agen-E, tender, or site-owner specifications; RED compliance mandatory for radio-enabled modules
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Slovenia networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, RED compliance for radio modules, and local communications-module requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯洛文尼亚联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、无线模块的RED合规，以及当地通信模块要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯洛維尼亞聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量、無線模組的RED合規，以及當地通訊模組要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。
